# secsec known-answer test vectors, v1
# All values hex (lowercase). Generated by the reference Rust implementation.
# See ../finaldesign.md §5, §9.1, §9.5 for the constructions.

[kdf]
# Inputs:
master_key = 1111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111
generation = 1
obj_type   = 0            # ObjType::Chunk
obj_key.id = 2222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222
roster_entry.seq = 1
roster_keyhist.g = 1
# Note: obj_key / roster_entry_key / roster_keyhist_key below take roster_key[g=1]
#       (value listed) as their first input, matching the reference test.
# Outputs:
enc_key[g=1][t=0]                       = f4980c049361ccff05371f5c95680bc6563786007cfb1cf94af33feef51c7102
id_key[g=1][t=0]                        = 8cb578fd23622f39495fceb7bbaa8871d231d91d0fd5262be2481800ad2f4e27
cdc_seed[g=1]                           = 6e792c1fbab509b44804004092e25b29de446feb222d27dab4da456627fadb69
roster_key[g=1]                         = 0ed99fa51a9e04918a45048b508afb58b38f14b8614d4d0d0c72e3d9a5f26fe7
ref_name_key                            = fb53df1905087813330741d575f364bc8a32343cafa3105f9d5e1fc337520ac3
mk_commit[g=1]                          = 73300b1d7cdd3cd2baeffd447f1b3ffdafde8e0e2f36c7c6feb99ed1cabf96a2
obj_key(roster_key[g=1], id)            = fe2d3fc22b54a0ca49b74df325a9f5202bf03e16b0ece7788f77236f3f18fe2b
roster_entry_key(roster_key[g=1], 1)    = 0866a38d6c6924ac9b411189b06e3a7c15ad01c94ff4bae11f11fc6a53b640aa
roster_keyhist_key(roster_key[g=1], 1)  = 3e5579e871ae6deb732e967391dcd05718a6c780ec82ece500235deb2b89d7d0

[frame]
# Frame::v1(gen=1, type=Chunk).encode() = MAGIC("ssec") | version(01) | algo(01) | gen(le32=01000000) | type(00)
frame.v1(gen=1, type=Chunk)             = 7373656301010100000000
